visualizerParams.title: BCD Bit Width Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The Binary Coded Decimal conversion is not producing standard 4-bit sequences for each digit. Some digits seem to have shorter binary representations, leading to incorrect alignment. Find and fix the error.

solution.explanation: In BCD, every decimal digit MUST be represented by exactly 4 bits. The buggy code didn't use `zfill(4)`, so digits like 1 (bin '1') and 2 (bin '10') were not properly padded to '0001' and '0010', resulting in an incorrect bitstream.
